chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. S – 15 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.62/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.63/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 06.02.2023 Petitioner Allah Dino Sajrani, present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency application is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. It appears that the petitioner has already availed his remedy before the learned Additional Sessions Judge-II/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur vide Cr. Misc. Application No.6325/2022; hence, he is directed to approach before the same Court if he is still being harassed by the respondents. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
